query: Détecter un scan de ports SYN sur un serveur web

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'un scan de ports SYN sur un serveur web
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SYN Scan détecté"; flags:S; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000001; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Scan UDP sur plage de ports pour services exposés
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"UDP Port Scan"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 5; sid:1000029; rev:1;)
alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"XMAS Scan"; flags:FPU; sid:1000046; rev:1;)

response: alert tcp any any -> $TARGET_IP port 80 protocol http state new action block msg "Syn Scan detected" timeout 5 sec limit 20 rate unlimited source unknown priority high timestamp off filter out-of-band-traffic category firewall snort version latest

query: Bloquer une attaque par force brute sur le protocole SSH

retrieved_docs.description: Tentative de connexion SSH par brute force
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 22 (msg:"SSH Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 60; sid:1000003; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'une attaque DoS par flood UDP
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert udp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"UDP Flood DoS"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 1000, seconds 1; sid:1000002; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Tentative de force brute sur authentification LDAP
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 389 (msg:"LDAP Brute Force"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 10, seconds 30; sid:1000036; rev:1;)

response: alert tcp any any -> $LOCALHOST 22 (msg:"Bruteforce SSH Access Denied" priority high severity medium timeout infinite retry unlimited filter "port=22 and protocol=tcp");

query: Identifier une injection SQL dans une requête HTTP

retrieved_docs.description: Injection SQL dans une requête HTTP GET
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"SQL Injection GET"; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"union+select"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000004; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Injection XSS dans un formulaire HTTP POST
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"XSS Injection"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"<script>"; nocase; http_client_body; sid:1000028; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Injection LDAP dans un formulaire d'authentification
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"LDAP Injection"; content:"POST"; http_method; content:"*)(uid=*"; http_client_body; sid:1000044; rev:1;)

response: alert tcp any any -> $TARGET_IP port:$PORT (msg="Injection SQL" severity=critical protocol=http version=HTTP method=get uri=/path/content query=(SELECT * FROM table WHERE id=?); sid=$SESSION_ID;)

query: Détecter un ransomware qui chiffre des fichiers via SMB

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'un ransomware chiffrant les fichiers réseau
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"Ransomware SMB Encryption"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42 25|"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 100, seconds 10; sid:1000040; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'un ver réseau se propageant via SMB
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 445 (msg:"SMB Worm Propagation"; content:"|FF 53 4D 42|"; depth:4; sid:1000021; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Téléchargement d'un exécutable via HTTP non chiffré
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET 80 (msg:"Téléchargement EXE HTTP"; content:"MZ"; within:2; depth:2; content:".exe"; nocase; http_uri; sid:1000010; rev:1;)

response: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $LOCALHOST 445 (msg="Ransomware SMB Chaining"; severity high; sid:1000069; rev:1;)

query: Repérer une exfiltration de données via le protocole DNS

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'exfiltration de données via DNS
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"DNS Data Exfiltration"; content:"TXT"; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 50, seconds 10; sid:1000017; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Détection d'exfiltration via protocole ICMP tunneling
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert icmp $HOME_NET any -> any any (msg:"ICMP Tunneling Exfiltration"; itype:8; dsize:>100; threshold:type both, track by_src, count 20, seconds 5; sid:1000049; rev:1;)

retrieved_docs.description: Requête DNS vers domaine malveillant connu
retrieved_docs.snort_rule: alert udp $HOME_NET any -> any 53 (msg:"DNS Malveillant"; content:"malware-c2.ru"; nocase; sid:1000034; rev:1;)

response: alert tcp any => any port 53 state RELATED ESTABLISHED * snort_rule_id=1000018 protocol dns timeout=10 delay=10 filter="not ((type == QUERY)&&(content =~ ".*bad.com"))" priority=high comment='Exfiltr
